name: Winchester Minerals & Gold Exploration Ltd.
description: Winchester Minerals & Gold Exploration Ltd. is a mineral exploration company that was founded on May 9, 1983. Headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, the company focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold mineral properties. While it has historically been involved in the mining sector, it is currently considered an inactive entity looking for new mineral opportunities to pursue. The company is publicly traded, with its shares historically listed on various markets, including the TSX Venture Exchange and the OTC markets under the ticker symbol WMGEF.
